creator: tom@hur.st
text:
Created attachment 244421
Git patch for devel/libjodycode 3.1

libjodycode is a library containing code shared among several of the programs written by Jody Bruchon such as imagepile, jdupes, winregfs, and zeromerge.

--

This will be a dependency for the incoming update of sysutils/jdupes.

Passes portlint/portfmt/poudriere testport.
